title: The Depths of Impel Down: Rising Conflict

dialogue.speaker: Ivankov
dialogue.text: Ahh....!! I see, that!! That happened!!

dialogue.speaker: Ivankov
dialogue.text: But in front of the prisoners?

dialogue.speaker: Ivankov
dialogue.text: as if they were taken by demons.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And we're already wearing this much!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It hurts!! It's so cold it hurts!

dialogue.speaker: Ivankov
dialogue.text: Ehhh!? You're running!? And so fast!!!
